mapper.select: SELECT c.id AS class_id, c.class_name, c.class_desc, c.sort AS class_sort, l.id, l.name, l.link, l.avatar, l.descr, l.rss, l.sort, l.created_at, l.updated_at FROM friend_link_class c LEFT JOIN friend_link l ON l.class_id = c.id ORDER BY c.sort ASC, c.id ASC, l.sort ASC, l.id ASC

SELECT id, class_name, class_desc, sort, created_at, updated_at FROM friend_link_class
class_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO friend_link_class (class_name, class_desc, sort) VALUES (#{className}, #{classDesc}, #{sort})
mapper.select:
SELECT l.id, l.class_id, c.class_name, c.class_desc, c.sort AS class_sort, l.name, l.link, l.avatar, l.descr, l.rss, l.sort, l.created_at, l.updated_at FROM friend_link l INNER JOIN friend_link_class c ON l.class_id = c.id
l.class_id = #{classId}
AND (l.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR l.link LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY c.sort ASC, c.id ASC, l.sort ASC, l.id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO friend_link (class_id, name, link, avatar, descr, rss, sort) VALUES (#{classId}, #{name}, #{link}, #{avatar}, #{descr}, #{rss}, #{sort})
mapper.update: UPDATE friend_link SET class_id = #{classId}, name = #{name}, link = #{link}, avatar = #{avatar}, descr = #{descr}, rss = #{rss}, sort = #{sort} WHERE id = #{id}
